name: FlowStep
goal: Single step for use inside <ce-flow> slot mode (CDR-005), or as a standalone step card with number, icon, title, and rich body content.
description: Carries a step number (n), title, optional icon, and optional color tint. Default slot accepts rich body content: paragraphs, lists, links, chips — anything HTML (CDR-002). When nested inside ce-flow the parent reads n/title/icon/color as attributes and consumes the default slot HTML via querySelectorAll — the step itself renders nothing (display:contents). When used standalone it renders a full step card.

props.name: n
props.description: Step number or label. Short string displayed as a step counter (e.g. "1", "2", "A").

props.name: title
props.description: Step title. Short identity string shown as the step heading.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional icon glyph or emoji displayed alongside the step number.

props.name: color
props.description: Optional color tint. One of the CecColor vocabulary values: neutral, green, red, amber, blue, purple, cyan.

slots.description: Rich step body content. Can contain paragraphs, lists, links, chips, or any HTML. In standalone mode rendered inside the step card; when nested in ce-flow the parent reads this HTML.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-1
cssVariables.description: Gap between step number and icon in standalone aside; step title bottom margin.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-3
cssVariables.description: Column gap between aside and main in standalone mode; vertical padding.

cssVariables.name: --ce-surface
cssVariables.description: Step card background in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-border
cssVariables.description: Step card border in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-radius
cssVariables.description: Step card border radius in standalone mode.

cssVariables.name: --ce-muted
cssVariables.description: Step number and body text color.

a11y.role: none (standalone: wrapper div; parent ce-flow handles list semantics)
a11y.notes: In standalone mode the icon is aria-hidden. When nested in ce-flow the parent renders the full accessible step list. The default slot can carry semantic HTML including links, time elements, and other inline semantics.
